title: Create Migration Directory and Placeholder Script
description: Establish a migrations directory and add a sample migration script as a placeholder for future database schema changes.
details: Within the backend project (apps/api), create a 'migrations/' directory. Add a sample migration script (e.g., '001-initial-schema.sql' or '001-initial-schema.js') that demonstrates the intended structure for future migrations. The script should include comments explaining where to add SQL or migration logic once a real database is integrated. Update the README or an inline comment to clarify that this is a placeholder and will be replaced when a database is configured.
test_strategy: Verify that the 'migrations/' directory exists and contains the sample migration script. Check that the script includes clear comments and follows naming conventions. Ensure documentation or comments clarify its placeholder status.

title: Document Migration Workflow in README
description: Add documentation to the README explaining how migrations will be managed once a database is integrated.
details: In the root README or the backend README, add a section titled 'Database Migrations'. Explain that the current migration setup is a placeholder and outline the recommended workflow for managing migrations (e.g., using tools like Prisma Migrate, TypeORM migrations, or raw SQL scripts) once a real database is configured. Include instructions for where to place migration files and how to run them in the future.
test_strategy: Check that the README contains a clear 'Database Migrations' section with guidance on future migration management. Ensure instructions are accurate and reference the placeholder migration directory.
